signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launched on Solana on April 17, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launched on Solana on April 17, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This integration via Hex Trust and LayerZero enables XRP holders to access Solana's DeFi ecosystem, with over 834,000 XRP ($1.2M) already wrapped and 50M more ($74.5M) queued from Ethereum, driving a +5.15% XRP price surge to $1.40 in the following 48 hours.[1]  
No newer confirmations, announcements, or resolution

signals.headline: Fed Chair Powell's Speech Today Warns Tariffs Will Drive Higher Inflation and Slower Growth, Fed to Wait on Rate Moves**
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell's Speech Today Warns Tariffs Will Drive Higher Inflation and Slower Growth, Fed to Wait on Rate Moves** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]

Powell delivered written remarks at the Economic Club of Chicago on Wednesday, stating President Trump's tariffs—larger than anticipated—are likely to cause higher inflation and slower economic growth, creating a "challenging scenario" for Fed
